title: thelypteris subsimilis
intro: Thelypteris subsimilis, also known as the lesser maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris subsimilis include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as helping to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris subsimilis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
